tag_line: AI-generated passenger voice dialogue for the RLS Taxi system
title: RLS Taxi Voice (LLM + ElevenLabs)
message:
Adds LLM-generated, ElevenLabs-synthesized passenger voice dialogue to the RLS Career Overhaul taxi system.

Passengers speak in character when you pick them up, comment mid-ride based on your driving, react to police chases, speed cameras, and crashes, and say a personalised farewell at the end.

Requires RLS Career Overhaul v2.6.0+. Configure your API keys in settings/taxiVoice.json before enabling.

Supports OpenAI, LMStudio, Ollama, or any OpenAI-compatible LLM endpoint.
